description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched gable roof with dark gray shingles and a prominent front porch supported by red posts. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, with a brick or stone foundation visible at the base. The front facade includes two symmetrically placed windows on the upper story and a screened porch area below, providing a sheltered entryway. The side views reveal a partially open section, likely a covered patio or carport, and additional porch space. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the private nature of the back. The structure sits on a rectangular grassy plot, suggesting a suburban or neighborhood setting.
description: A wooden bungalow with a steep gable roof, red-trimmed windows, and a spacious front porch, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, screened porch, and two upper windows with red trim.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the extended porch area and a partially open section, possibly a carport.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden wall, no windows or doors, and a covered patio area.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the porch extension and the screened area wrapping around the side.
